title: FloristryWarehouse Poinsettia Bush White Artificial Silk 7 Heads 30cm
features: Artificial silk Christmas white Poinsettia bush with 7 flowers
Great value and ideal for decorating garlands and wreaths or other craft work
7 individually wired stems each with dark green foliage and 10cm (4 inch) diameter flower.
description: Product description Artificial silk Christmas white Poinsettia bush with 7 flowers. Great value and ideal for decorating garlands and wreaths or other craft work. 7 individually wired stems each with dark green foliage and 10cm (4 inch) diameter flower. Overall length 30cm (12 in). All 7 stems merge into one for easy potting or arranging in a vase. The bunch can also be cut for use in arrangements. This item is delivered in compacted form for postage and may need some simple arranging to look like the photo. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate. Safety Warning This artificial plant contains materials that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets. This product is intended for both indoor and outdoor use. Be cautious when arranging the product as it may be compacted and could pose a risk of injury.
